nodes.label: We need to separate the section containing the base64 string. The original value is used to render the base64 on the ShareFeedback page.

flows.pseudocode:

NODES=7; EDGES=4
1. START
2. DECISION Has Screenshot? expression=$ImageB64 != empty and $ImageB64 != ''
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. END
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  6. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  7. END

nodes.label: This microflow sends the feedback to App Insights.

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: FeedbackModule.SUB_Feedback_PostToAppInsights
NODES=8; EDGES=5
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable ServerLocation='https://feedback-api.mendix.com/v2/feedback-items'
3. ACTION RestCallAction: RestCallAction (errorHandlingType=CustomWithoutRollBack)
4. BRANCH
  5. END
6. BRANCH on error
  7. ACTION LogMessageAction: LogMessageAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  8. END

The feedback is sanitized to prevent XSS.

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: FeedbackModule.SUB_Feedback_Sanitize
NODES=14; EDGES=11
1. START
2. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedSubject
3. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedDescription
4. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedBrowser
5. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedEnvironmentURL
6. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedActiveUserRoles
7. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedPageName
8. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedSubmitterDisplayName
9. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedSubmitterEmail
10. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.XSS_Sanitizer -> SanitizedSubmitterUUID
11. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Feedback (Subject=$SanitizedSubject, Description=$SanitizedDescription, SubmitterUUID=$SanitizedSubmitterUUID, SubmitterEmail=$SanitizedSubmitterEmail, SubmitterDisplayName=$SanitizedSubmitterDisplayName, ActiveUserRoles=$SanitizedActiveUserRoles, PageName=$SanitizedPageName, Browser=$SanitizedBrowser, +1 more; refreshInClient=false)
12. END

nodes.label: AppId is not empty or 1? expression=$Feedback/AppID != '1' and $Feedback/AppID != empty and $Feedback/AppID != ''
nodes.detail: AppId is not empty or 1? expression=$Feedback/AppID != '1' and $Feedback/AppID != empty and $Feedback/AppID != ''

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: FeedbackModule.SUB_Feedback_SendToServer
NODES=15; EDGES=15
1. START
2. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow FeedbackModule.SUB_Feedback_Sanitize
3. DECISION Has Screenshot? expression=$Feedback/ImageB64 != empty and $Feedback/ImageB64 != ''
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  5. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  6. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  7. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  8. DECISION AppId is not empty or 1? expression=$Feedback/AppID != '1' and $Feedback/AppID != empty and $Feedback/AppID != ''
  9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    10. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow FeedbackModule.SUB_Feedback_PostToAppInsights -> Response
    11. BRANCH
      12. END
    13. BRANCH on error
      14. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      15. END
  16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    17. ACTION LogMessageAction: LogMessageAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    18. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    19. REF ExclusiveMerge
20. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  21. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Feedback (ScreenshotName='screenshot-' + formatDateTime([%CurrentDateTime%],'yyyy-MM-dd-HH-mm-ss')+'.'+ toLowerCase(substring($Feedback/ImageB64,find($Feedback/ImageB64, 'data:image/') + 11,3)); refreshInClient=false)
  22. REF ExclusiveMerge

nodes.label: JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.ValidateEmail -> IsValidEmail
The validations are identical to those used in the Mendix Feedback API v2
Email not empty? expression=$Feedback/SubmitterEmail != empty and $Feedback/SubmitterEmail != ''
nodes.detail: Email not empty? expression=$Feedback/SubmitterEmail != empty and $Feedback/SubmitterEmail != ''

nodes.label: Subject not empty? expression=trim($Feedback/Subject) != empty and trim($Feedback/Subject) != ''
nodes.detail: Subject not empty? expression=trim($Feedback/Subject) != empty and trim($Feedback/Subject) != ''

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: FeedbackModule.VAL_Feedback
NODES=29; EDGES=31
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable ValidFeedback=true
3. DECISION Subject not empty? expression=trim($Feedback/Subject) != empty and trim($Feedback/Subject) != ''
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. DECISION Subject < 200 characters expression=length(trim($Feedback/Subject)) <= 200
  6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    7. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    8. DECISION Description < 32000 characters? expression=length(trim($Feedback/Description)) <= 32000
    9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      10. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      11. DECISION Email not empty? expression=$Feedback/SubmitterEmail != empty and $Feedback/SubmitterEmail != ''
      12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        13. ACTION JavaActionCallAction: call java action FeedbackModule.ValidateEmail -> IsValidEmail
        14. DECISION Email is Valid? expression=$IsValidEmail
        15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          16. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          17. END
        18. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          19. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
          20. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          21. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ValidFeedback=false
          22. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          23. REF ExclusiveMerge
      24. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        25. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
        26. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        27. REF ExclusiveMerge
    28. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      29. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      30. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ValidFeedback=false
      31. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      32. REF ExclusiveMerge
  33. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    34. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    35. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    36. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable ValidFeedback=false
    37. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    38. REF ExclusiveMerge
39. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  40. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
  41. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  42. REF ExclusiveMerge

nodes.label: This JS Action triggers the Screenshot pop-up mode in the Feedback Widget. The widget will send back to the mendix client browser a base64 formatted image.

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Nanoflow: FeedbackModule.ACT_Feedback_TriggerScreenshotMode
NODES=14; EDGES=12
1. START
2. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
3. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action FeedbackModule.JS_ToggleFeedbackScreenshotWidget -> base64FromWidget
4. DECISION Upload Not Cancelled? expression=$base64FromWidget != 'uploadCancelled'
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  6. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  7. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  8. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  9. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page FeedbackModule.ShareFeedback
  10. END
11. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  12. DECISION is not Empty? expression=$base64FromWidget != empty
  13. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    14. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Feedback (ImageB64=$base64FromWidget; refreshInClient=true)
    15. REF ExclusiveMerge
  16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    17. END

nodes.label: Expand this annotation to read more... What does this JavaScript Action do? This is a custom build JavaScript Action that triggers the file upload dialog box to...
Expand this annotation to read more.... What does this JavaScript action do? After you have uploaded an image it removes locally stored image from memory. This ...
The widget will convert the annotated image to base64

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Nanoflow: FeedbackModule.ACT_Feedback_UploadImage
NODES=26; EDGES=21
1. START
2. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable mimeTypes='.gif,.png,.jpg,.jpeg'
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable fileUploadSize=5
4. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action FeedbackModule.JS_UploadAndConvertToFileBlobURL -> fileBlobURL
5. DECISION Upload Not Cancelled? expression=$fileBlobURL != 'uploadCancelled'
6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  7. DECISION Uploaded Image? expression=$fileBlobURL != empty
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    9. DECISION Correct Upload Size? expression=$fileBlobURL != 'fileSizeNotAccepted'
    10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      11. DECISION Correct File Type? expression=$fileBlobURL != 'fileTypeNotAccepted'
      12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        13. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page
        14. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action FeedbackModule.JS_ToggleFeedbackAnnotateWidget -> base64ImageFromWidget
        15. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Feedback (ImageB64=$base64ImageFromWidget; refreshInClient=true)
        16. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page FeedbackModule.ShareFeedback
        17. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action FeedbackModule.SetStorageItemObject -> ReturnValueName
        18. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action FeedbackModule.JS_RevokeUploadedFileFromMemory -> ReturnValueName
        19. END
      20. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        21. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Only images with format of .gif .jpg .jpeg .png are allowed, type=Error, blocking=true)
        22. END
    23. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      24. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Maximum image size allowed is 5MB., type=Error, blocking=true)
      25. END
  26. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    27. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=Upload failed, please try again., type=Error, blocking=true)
    28. END
29. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  30. END

FLOW Nanoflow: FeedbackModule.ACT_SubmitFeedback
NODES=14; EDGES=12
1. START
2. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow FeedbackModule.VAL_Feedback -> isValid
3. DECISION Feedback form Valid? expression=$isValid
4. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  5. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow FeedbackModule.SUB_Feedback_SendToServer -> ResponseHelper
  6. ACTION CloseFormAction: close page (pagesToClose=1)
  7. DECISION is Success? expression=$ResponseHelper != empty
  8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    9. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page FeedbackModule.PopupSuccess
    10. ACTION NanoflowCallAction: call nanoflow FeedbackModule.SUB_Feedback_ResetLocalStorage
    11. END
  12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    13. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    14. ACTION ShowPageAction: show page FeedbackModule.PopupFailure
    15. END
16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  17. END

flows.pseudocode:

NODES=8; EDGES=8
1. START
2. ACTION JavaScriptActionCallAction: call javascript action FeedbackModule.GetStorageItemObject -> LocalFeedback
3. BRANCH
  4. DECISION Found? expression=$LocalFeedback != empty
  5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    6. END
  7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    8. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    9. ACTION CreateObjectAction: create FeedbackModule.Feedback as NewFeedback
    10. END
11. BRANCH on error
  12. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  13. REF ExclusiveMerge
